plugins.prepareCmd: pnpm --dir _libs/core version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/cli version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm --dir _libs/vscode version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version --no-git-checks --allow-same-version && pnpm turbo run build --filter=@puristic/env --filter=@puristic/env-cli --filter=env
plugins.publishCmd: pnpm --dir _libs/core publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/cli publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --dir _libs/vscode exec vsce publish --no-dependencies
